meta.title: Training progress (illustrative)
meta.note: Hand-tuned illustrative autocurriculum — not measured output. The JAX trainer needs a GPU; this curve exists so the Learning tab tells the emergence story for newcomers.

milestones.title: Running & Chasing
milestones.desc: Seekers learn to chase hiders down in the open arena.

milestones.title: Fleeing & Hiding
milestones.desc: Hiders learn to run and break the seekers' line of sight.

milestones.title: Fort Building
milestones.desc: Hiders grab boxes and barricade a shelter during the prep phase.

milestones.title: Cooperative Push
milestones.desc: Two hiders shove a heavy box together — real teamwork.

milestones.title: Ramp Use
milestones.desc: Seekers drag a ramp to the fort and climb in to breach it.

milestones.title: Ramp Defense
milestones.desc: Hiders lock ramps away before the seekers are even released.

milestones.title: Sensory Deception
milestones.desc: Hiders trigger decoys to send the seekers the wrong way.

milestones.title: Door Blocking
milestones.desc: Hiders jam a doorway with a heavy box to hold a chokepoint.
